attributes.action: Increase NHS Funding for Dementia Patients
attributes.additional_details:
Many of the elderly population are having to pay for care and not even considered or referred for Continuing Healthcare Fundraising must referred the individual to the relevant ICB.
I have looked at Decision Support Tool has 12 domains and results show most dementia patients meet the comprehensive picture which capture the nature/complexity/intensity and unpredictability and the quality and quantity of care. According to the National Framework for NHS Continuing Healthcare and NHS funded Nursing
attributes.background: My mother is presently in a rehabilitation unit in Manchester and waiting for Tameside Authority to provide her with essential equipment for her home as well and a full package of care which she will have to pay for even though she has contributed to society throughout her working life.

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.

We're not sure exactly what aspect of dementia care that you'd like the Government or Parliament to provide increased funding for. We are also unable to publish petitions which contain people's personal information.

You may wish to submit a new petition which concentrates on continuing healthcare pathways for dementia patients.
